name: Cranberry Lemon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together butter and 3/4 cup sugar in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, then lemon rind. Beat well.
4. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together. Add to batter alternately with milk. Beat until smooth.
5. Fold in cranberries and pecans. Pour batter into greased loaf pan.
6. Bake for 55-60 minutes.
7. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes. Turn out onto a rack.
8. When completely cool, combine lemon juice and sugar. Spoon over top.
9. Wrap well. Note: Best when served the day after baking, so flavors have a chance to mingle.
